scripts.test: node scripts/check-openclaw-plugin-versions.mjs && pnpm -r test && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-local test:grounded && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-local test:meaning && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-local test:review && node scripts/check-package-capabilities.mjs && node scripts/check-package-install-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-private-workbench-transfer.mjs && node scripts/check-private-workbench-provisioning-safety.mjs
scripts.version-packages: changeset version && pnpm -r --if-present sync:openclaw-plugin-version && pnpm install --lockfile-only
